reasoning: Qwen's comprehensive review of 13 files (including critical maintainer scripts postinst/postrm/prerm) found only standard packaging operations. Deepseek's inconclusive result stemmed from a technical error during file selection, not security findings.
disagreement_analysis: Deepseek failed to review critical files due to LLM response error, while Qwen successfully analyzed all relevant scripts and found them safe.
coverage_issues: deepseek failed to review src/postinst, src/postrm, src/prerm - critical maintainer scripts that execute during install/remove
learnings: Improve error handling for LLM file selection failures
Prioritize review of maintainer scripts (postinst/postrm/prerm) before less critical files
Implement fallback mechanisms when primary model fails to respond
